earlyJourney: My interest in technology started with curiosity about how software works behind the scenes. I began by learning web development and gradually became more interested in backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and the engineering that powers modern applications.
learningPhase: I built my frontend foundation during my internship at Scotinent Technologies, where I worked with React.js, REST APIs, and collaborative development practices.
growthPhase: At Bizpel Connecting Dots Pvt. Ltd., I transitioned into backend engineering, developing REST APIs, authentication systems, media management, and backend services for BizArt while gaining hands-on experience with production software development.
projectMindset: I enjoy building projects that solve practical engineering problems and help me understand how production systems are designed, deployed, and maintained. My projects focus on backend architecture, cloud technologies, and developer tooling.
currentFocus: I am currently focused on backend engineering, DevOps, cloud computing, distributed systems, and building InfraPilot, a platform aimed at simplifying application deployment, monitoring, and infrastructure management.
